step_rationale: Platelet cytoskeleton protein; released during activation and aggregation.
mechanism: Vinculin is released from platelet cytoskeleton during activation and aggregation, marking platelet involvement in acute coronary thrombosis.

references.title: Variations in Blood Platelet Proteome and Transcriptome Revealed Altered Expression of Transgelin-2 in Acute Coronary Syndrome Patients.
Plasma proteome profiling of atherosclerotic disease manifestations reveals elevated levels of the cytoskeletal protein vinculin.
Proteomic changes related to "bewildered" circulating platelets in the acute coronary syndrome.
